MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Cor. is present. Represented by Cakiya Moten.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jose Osorio is present.
Attorney Elizabeth Weeker representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Michael Lee, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of April 8, 2013 vacated. (501/JPT)
